title: Spread em
description: Gives every player a different world spawn
body:
**Spread Em** gives every player their own spawn position instead of having them all share worldspawn. You can configure the spread distance and blacklist biomes to avoid having players spawn there.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
